title: Create fashion products website with Pinterest integration

requirements.text: Create a product catalog backend with CRUD operations for fashion products including fields: name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes methods to create, read, update, and delete fashion products
Each product stores name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID
Products are persisted in stable storage

requirements.text: Implement product browsing interface displaying fashion products in a grid layout with product images, names, prices, and categories
acceptanceCriteria: Products display in a responsive grid layout
Each product card shows image, name, price, and category
Grid adapts to different screen sizes

requirements.text: Add Pinterest integration allowing users to link products to Pinterest pins by storing Pinterest pin URLs or IDs with each product
acceptanceCriteria: Product creation form includes field for Pinterest pin URL or ID
Products display a link to view the associated Pinterest pin
Pinterest links open in new tab when clicked

requirements.text: Create product detail view showing full product information including name, description, price, category, large product image, and Pinterest pin link
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a product card navigates to detail view
Detail view displays all product information
Pinterest pin link is prominently displayed if available

requirements.text: Implement admin interface for authenticated users to add, edit, and delete fashion products with form validation
acceptanceCriteria: Admin section requires Internet Identity authentication
Form includes all product fields with appropriate input types
Price validation ensures positive numbers
Success and error messages display after operations

requirements.text: Add category filtering to allow users to browse products by fashion category (e.g., dresses, shoes, accessories)
acceptanceCriteria: Category filter dropdown or buttons display above product grid
Selecting a category filters the displayed products
All categories option shows all products

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by fashion e-commerce aesthetics with elegant typography, a sophisticated color palette (avoiding blue and purple), clean whitespace, and modern layout patterns that emphasize product imagery
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme applied across all pages
Typography hierarchy enhances readability and elegance
Layout emphasizes visual appeal of fashion products
Design feels cohesive and professional

constraints: Pinterest integration should store pin URLs/IDs, not require direct API access
All product data must be stored in the Motoko backend
nonGoals: Direct Pinterest API integration for posting or fetching pins

required: Fashion-themed hero banner with elegant styling showing clothing on hangers or fashion accessories (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Placeholder product image for fashion items when no image URL is provided (placeholder-product.dim_400x600.png)
